title: LayerZero DVN Operator Registry
description: Public registry of known LayerZero Decentralized Verification Network (DVN) operators. Aggregated from LayerZero official documentation, Etherscan, and public announcements. No private data.

custody_level_definitions.L0: Protocol team or founding entity — single key custodian, highest centralization risk
custody_level_definitions.L1: Single independent entity — corporate or institutional key holder
custody_level_definitions.L2: Multi-sig or threshold — distributed among known parties
custody_level_definitions.L3: ZK-proof or cryptographic verification — minimal trust assumptions

fc_context.finding: requiredDVNCount = 1 allows a single DVN at any custody level to approve fraudulent cross-chain messages unilaterally. L0/L1 operators in 1-of-1 configurations represent maximum exploit surface.
fc_context.risk_pattern: L0 or L1 operator with requiredDVNCount = 1 → FC-001 attack vector

operators.name: LayerZero Labs
operators.custody_notes: Protocol creator. Default DVN on most deployments. Single entity controls signing infrastructure.
operators.fc_risk_note: L0 custody. In 1-of-1 configs: direct FC-001 pattern.
operators.confidence_note: Address in official LayerZero V2 DVN address list. Etherscan label confirms LayerZero Labs identity.

operators.name: Google Cloud
operators.custody_notes: Enterprise DVN. Key management under Google Cloud infrastructure. Single institutional custodian.
operators.fc_risk_note: L1 institutional custody. Reduced risk vs L0 but single-entity trust.
operators.confidence_note: Official Google Cloud blog announcement. Address confirmed on Etherscan with Google Cloud label.

operators.name: Polyhedra Network
operators.custody_notes: Address not verified — null pending primary source confirmation.
operators.fc_risk_note: L3 ZK verification. Lowest custody risk in the DVN ecosystem.
operators.confidence_note: Ecosystem page + zkBridge public docs confirm identity. Address not Etherscan-verified. L3 custody inferred from ZK architecture — not confirmed by primary disclosure.

operators.name: Nethermind
operators.custody_notes: Blockchain research and infrastructure firm. Operates DVN signing infrastructure independently.
operators.fc_risk_note: L1 independent operator. Standard custody profile.
operators.confidence_note: Address in official LayerZero V2 DVN address list. Etherscan confirms Nethermind operator label.

operators.name: Blockdaemon
operators.custody_notes: Enterprise blockchain infrastructure provider. Institutional-grade key management systems.
operators.fc_risk_note: L1 enterprise custody. Institutional SLA, single-entity trust.
operators.confidence_note: Address in official LayerZero V2 DVN address list. Etherscan confirms Blockdaemon operator label.

operators.name: Bware Labs
operators.custody_notes: Address sourced from LayerZero metadata API 2026-06-02. Marked deprecated by operator.
operators.confidence_note: Listed in LayerZero docs. Address not Etherscan-verified. L1 classification inferred from company profile — no primary disclosure of key management architecture.

operators.name: Horizen Labs
operators.custody_notes: Address sourced from LayerZero metadata API 2026-06-02. Standard configuration.
operators.fc_risk_note: L2 multi-sig (inferred). Better risk profile than L0/L1 if confirmed.
operators.confidence_note: Ecosystem page listing. Address not Etherscan-verified. L2 multi-sig classification inferred from public ZK infrastructure descriptions — not independently confirmed for DVN role specifically.

operators.name: BCW Group
operators.custody_notes: Address sourced from LayerZero metadata API 2026-06-02. Standard configuration. Hong Kong jurisdiction.
operators.confidence_note: Listed in LayerZero DVN address docs. Address not Etherscan-verified. L1 inferred from company profile — no public DVN-specific key management disclosure.

operators.name: Animoca Brands
operators.custody_notes: Address not verified — null pending primary source confirmation.
operators.fc_risk_note: Address unknown. Confidence insufficient to assess FC-001 pattern applicability.
operators.confidence_note: Ecosystem page partner listing only. No public DVN address. No independent confirmation of DVN operation, key management, or custody level. All fields beyond entity name are unconfirmed.

operators.name: Mercury
operators.custody_notes: Address not verified — null pending primary source confirmation.
operators.fc_risk_note: Confidence insufficient. Cannot assess risk profile without address or entity verification.
operators.confidence_note: Name in LayerZero documentation with no associated address, entity registration, or infrastructure disclosure. All fields unverified — included for completeness only.

operators.name: P2P Validator
operators.custody_notes: Independent staking infrastructure provider. Address sourced from docs.layerzero.network 2026-06-01.
operators.fc_risk_note: L1 independent operator. Standard custody profile.
operators.confidence_note: Address from official LayerZero DVN address docs. Not independently Etherscan-verified. L1 classification inferred from company profile.

operators.name: Stakely
operators.custody_notes: Address not verified — null pending primary source confirmation.
operators.fc_risk_note: Address unknown. Confidence insufficient to assess FC-001 pattern applicability.
operators.confidence_note: Listed in LayerZero DVN documentation. No Etherscan-verified address. All fields beyond entity name are unconfirmed.

summary.note: 4 operators verified (Etherscan + primary source). 5 inferred (listed in docs, details unconfirmed). 3 unknown (ecosystem listing or no address). 10 of 12 are L0 or L1 custody — FC-001 pattern applies in 1-of-1 configurations.

confidence_definitions.verified: Address confirmed on Etherscan + operator identity confirmed by primary source (official docs, official blog, or on-chain label). All stated fields are independently checkable.
confidence_definitions.inferred: Operator listed in LayerZero documentation. One or more fields (custody level, key management model) are inferred from public descriptions, not confirmed by primary source.
confidence_definitions.unknown: Operator name appears in ecosystem listing only. No Etherscan-verified address, no detailed public disclosure. Fields should not be relied upon without independent verification.
